data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Ba²⁺与SO₄²⁻、CO₃²⁻反应实验" goal="通过向含SO₄²⁻和CO₃²⁻的溶液中加入BaCl₂，观察沉淀的生成及其与稀盐酸的反应，分析Ba²⁺与SO₄²⁻、CO₃²⁻的反应类型，并写出离子方程式，总结实验结论。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_3" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_rack" type="rack" />
      <Component id="test_tube_clamp_1" type="clamp" />
      <Component id="test_tube_clamp_2" type="clamp" />
      <Component id="test_tube_clamp_3" type="clamp" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="dropper" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="dilute_H2SO4" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Na2SO4_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Na2CO3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="BaCl2_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="dilute_HCl" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_clamp_1" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_2" support="test_tube_clamp_2" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_3" support="test_tube_clamp_3" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2SO4" volume="2 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="Na2SO4" volume="2 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="Na2CO3" volume="2 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="BaCl2" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_6" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="BaCl2" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="BaCl2" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_8" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_9" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_10" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_3" id="step_11" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_12" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="HCl" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_13" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="HCl" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_14" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="HCl" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_15" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_16" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_17" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_3" id="step_18" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_19" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准备实验装置，将三支试管分别固定在试管夹上，为后续加液做准备。
向三支试管分别加入稀硫酸、硫酸钠溶液和碳酸钠溶液，建立不同的反应体系。
向三支试管分别滴加BaCl₂溶液，并充分混合，观察沉淀的生成情况。
向三支试管分别加入稀盐酸并搅拌，观察沉淀的变化，分析沉淀的性质。
